Operation 'messages.send' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is completely empty. Added comprehensive details about bulk messaging capability (key API feature), expected inputs, return values, and how to track delivery status. This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and integration points.

data.description_suggestion: Sends SMS messages to one or more contacts. Accepts a batch of message requests with recipient phone numbers, message content, and optional template references. Supports bulk messaging in a single API call. Returns a response containing message IDs and delivery status for tracking. Messages are queued for delivery and status updates are available via the fetch message endpoint or webhooks.
data.reasoning: Description is completely empty. Added comprehensive details about bulk messaging capability (key API feature), expected inputs, return values, and how to track delivery status. This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and integration points.

message: Operation 'messages.fetch' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is incomplete ('messag' appears truncated). Enhanced to explain what data is returned, the purpose of fetching individual messages, and how it relates to message tracking workflows.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single message by its ID. Returns the complete message object including recipient, content, delivery status, timestamps, and any associated metadata. Use this endpoint to check the current delivery status of a previously sent message or retrieve message details for tracking purposes.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete ('messag' appears truncated). Enhanced to explain what data is returned, the purpose of fetching individual messages, and how it relates to message tracking workflows.

Added details about pagination support (mentioned in API docs), return structure, and use cases. Helps AI agents understand how to retrieve and iterate through templates.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all message templates for the account. Supports filtering and pagination via query parameters (offset, limit). Returns template objects containing template ID, name, content, and metadata. Use this endpoint to browse available templates before sending messages or campaigns.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added details about pagination support (mentioned in API docs), return structure, and use cases. Helps AI agents understand how to retrieve and iterate through templates.

message: Operation 'templates.create' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added information about what the operation creates, expected inputs, return value, and how templates integrate with messaging workflows. Clarifies that templates are reusable resources for bulk messaging.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new reusable message template for the account. Accepts template name, content, and optional metadata in the request body. Returns the created template object with assigned template ID. The template can then be referenced when sending messages or creating campaigns. Templates support variable substitution for personalization.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added information about what the operation creates, expected inputs, return value, and how templates integrate with messaging workflows. Clarifies that templates are reusable resources for bulk messaging.

message: Operation 'templates.fetch' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Description is empty. Added details about what data is returned and the typical use case for retrieving individual templates.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single template by its ID. Returns the complete template object including name, content, creation timestamp, and any associated metadata. Use this endpoint to view template details before using it in a message or campaign.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added details about what data is returned and the typical use case for retrieving individual templates.

message: Operation 'templates.update' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added critical side effect information (future messages use updated template) and clarification that past messages are unaffected. This helps AI agents understand the scope of template modifications.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing template by ID. Accepts template name, content, and metadata in the request body. Returns the updated template object. Changes to templates affect all future messages and campaigns that reference this template. Existing messages sent with the previous template version are not affected.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added critical side effect information (future messages use updated template) and clarification that past messages are unaffected. This helps AI agents understand the scope of template modifications.

message: Operation 'templates.remove' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Description is empty. Added critical side effect information about permanent deletion and impact on dependent resources. Included warning about checking template usage before deletion to help AI agents avoid destructive operations.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a template by ID. The template is permanently removed and cannot be recovered. Campaigns or messages that reference this template will no longer be able to use it. Returns a success confirmation. Ensure the template is no longer in use before deletion.
data.reasoning: Description is empty. Added critical side effect information about permanent deletion and impact on dependent resources. Included warning about checking template usage before deletion to help AI agents avoid destructive operations.

message: Operation 'conversations.close' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The summary is clear and actionable, but the description is completely missing. Added context about what closing means (prevents new messages), that historical data is retained, and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand the side effects and when to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Closes an active conversation thread with a contact, preventing further message history from being added to this conversation. The conversation remains accessible for historical reference but will no longer receive new messages. Returns the updated conversation object with closed status.
data.reasoning: The summary is clear and actionable, but the description is completely missing. Added context about what closing means (prevents new messages), that historical data is retained, and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand the side effects and when to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Share file - use to host a file and generate a short link to be used directly in a message or as a link to media for a MMS
data.summary_suggestion: Host file and generate shareable link for messaging
data.description_suggestion: Uploads and hosts a file on Sakari's servers, generating a short URL that can be embedded directly in SMS messages or used as media links for MMS. Accepts file uploads and returns a shortened link suitable for message content. The generated link remains active for the duration of your account.
data.reasoning: Summary is too long and reads like a description. Condensed to 8 words while keeping the core action. Added missing description explaining the operation's purpose, what it accepts, what it returns, and the persistence of generated links. This clarifies for AI agents when to use this tool and what to expect.

message: Operation 'webhooks.fetchAll' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and concise. However, the description explains what webhooks do in general rather than what this specific operation does. Replaced with operation-specific details about retrieval, pagination, event types, and use cases. This helps AI agents understand the operation's actual purpose and what data it returns.

data.current_description: When messages are acknowledge by carriers, a notification is sent to the specified URL
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all active webhook subscriptions for the account. Returns a paginated list of webhook endpoints currently configured to receive event notifications. Webhooks are triggered for various events including message carrier acknowledgments, delivery status changes, and inbound messages. Use this to audit your current webhook configuration.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and concise. However, the description explains what webhooks do in general rather than what this specific operation does. Replaced with operation-specific details about retrieval, pagination, event types, and use cases. This helps AI agents understand the operation's actual purpose and what data it returns.

message: Operation 'webhooks.subscribe' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is generic and doesn't explain the operation itself. Added details about what the operation does (registers endpoint), required inputs (URL), optional filtering, return value (subscription object with ID), and side effects (immediate activation). This enables AI agents to understand how to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: When messages are acknowledge by carriers, a notification is sent to the specified URL
data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications for the account. Requires a target URL where notifications will be sent. Supports filtering by event types (e.g., message acknowledgments, delivery status, inbound messages). Returns the created webhook subscription with a unique identifier. The webhook will immediately begin receiving notifications for matching events.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is generic and doesn't explain the operation itself. Added details about what the operation does (registers endpoint), required inputs (URL), optional filtering, return value (subscription object with ID), and side effects (immediate activation). This enables AI agents to understand how to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'webhooks.unsubscribe' has semantic quality issues: inconsistent_terminology, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary has grammatical issue ('Unsubscribe to' should be 'Unsubscribe from'). Description is minimal and doesn't explain side effects clearly. Improved summary with correct preposition. Enhanced description to clarify immediate deactivation, that it stops future notifications (not past ones), and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a webhook subscription, stopping all event notifications from being sent to the specified URL. The webhook endpoint is immediately deactivated and will no longer receive any notifications. Returns confirmation of the deletion. Previously received notifications are not affected.
data.reasoning: Summary has grammatical issue ('Unsubscribe to' should be 'Unsubscribe from'). Description is minimal and doesn't explain side effects clearly. Improved summary with correct preposition. Enhanced description to clarify immediate deactivation, that it stops future notifications (not past ones), and what is returned. This helps AI agents understand the operation's effects and when to use it.
